title: EvaluationQuery
description: What the blind runner sees. Must NOT contain any expected_* fields.

case_id.description: Unique identifier for the evaluation case.

question.description: The natural-language question to ask the RAG engine.

document_names.description: Document filenames the query is scoped to.

tags.description: Slice tags attached to this case (intent, language, source_type, difficulty, safety).

metadata.description: Free-form metadata that does not leak label information.

not.description: Reject any expected_* field to enforce label isolation.
